basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority, Dibrugarh (DLSA Dibrugarh)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Dibrugarh (DLSA Dibrugarh) Driver Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DLSA Dibrugarh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Dibrugarh Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Govt. norms for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: VIII pass, Valid LMV driving license
qualification.details: Minimum VIII pass with valid LMV driving license. Candidates who have passed HSSLC or above shall not be eligible.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the DLSA Dibrugarh Driver walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Driver post at DLSA Dibrugarh is scheduled for 06 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is VIII pass along with a valid LMV driving license. Candidates who have passed HSSLC or above are not eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver post is between 18 years and 40 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver post on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will contain all detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of relevant certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the District Legal Services Authority, Dibrugarh.
